data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Bloomberg Analyst Warns: Gold and Silver May Have Peaked
data.description: Gold remains above $4,600, but a senior analyst warns that the peak in January might have been a 'once-in-a-generation' historical high. According to Jin10, silver is also facing similar concerns. The ongoing conflict in Iran raises questions about whether it will support gold prices or mark the beginning of a bubble burst.

data.title: Bloomberg analysts warn that gold and silver may have peaked, and the "once-in-a-generation" high may have passed.
data.description: In his April metals market outlook report, Bloomberg Intelligence senior market analyst Mike McGlone stated that gold is facing a tough hurdle, created by excessive speculation at the beginning of the year, with the January peak potentially representing a once-in-a-generation historical high. He noted that gold is still struggling as speculative momentum has transformed the yellow metal from a safe-haven asset into a risk asset. He pointed out that the precious metal's 180-day volatility is more than double that of the S&P 500 and is at its highest quarterly level since 2006. Like gold, silver's surge to $120 per ounce in January may also represent a historic peak. (Kitco)

data.title: Bithumb will list Venice Token (VVV)
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bithumb will launch a trading pair for Venice Token (VVV) in Korean Won.

data.title: SIREN Token Experiences Significant Price Drop
data.description: The SIREN token has experienced a significant decline, dropping over 84% in the past 24 hours, with its current price at 0.27 USDT. According to Foresight News, the token has undergone severe fluctuations over the past week. Users are advised to remain cautious amid these volatile market conditions.

data.title: CaixaBank Secures EU MiCA Authorization for Crypto Services
data.description: CaixaBank has received authorization under the EU's MiCA regulations to operate as a crypto asset service provider, becoming the sixth licensed bank in Spain to offer crypto custody, trading, and transfer services. According to ChainCatcher, the other authorized institutions include BBVA, Openbank (a subsidiary of Santander Group), Cecabank, Renta 4 Banco, and Kutxabank. BBVA was the first to receive approval in 2025 and launched Bitcoin and Ethereum trading and custody services in July of the same year. The MiCA authorization serves as a regulatory passport within the EU, allowing licensed institutions to operate legally without needing to apply in each country. Spain's transition period will end on June 30, 2026, after which unauthorized institutions will be prohibited from providing crypto asset services.

data.title: Stable Token Scheduled for Unlocking on April 8
data.description: Stable (STABLE) tokens are set to be unlocked on April 8 at 13:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, data from the Web3 asset platform RootData indicates that approximately 88,889,000 tokens will be released. The value of these tokens is estimated at $25.33 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Trades Above Realized Price, Indicating Accumulation Zone
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading approximately 21% above its realized price of $54,286, according to data from CryptoQuant. This level remains above the threshold that has historically marked cycle bottoms. According to NS3.AI, CryptoQuant analyst Oinonen has identified the current market conditions as an accumulation zone. However, historical data suggests that the 2022 bottom was formed when the spot price was at or below the realized price.

data.title: Empery Digital reduced its holdings by 79 bitcoins last week, bringing its total holdings down to 3,359 bitcoins.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin treasury company Empery Digital disclosed that it sold 79 bitcoins last week at an average price of $71,031, generating approximately $5.6 million in revenue. Its total Bitcoin holdings have decreased to 3,359 bitcoins. The company also disclosed that it has spent approximately $137 million to repurchase 23,630,147 shares of common stock and will continue to sell Bitcoin as needed to fund future share buybacks and potentially repay some outstanding debt. (Businesswire)

data.title: Arkham: EdgeX airdrops allegedly went nearly half to partners and limited partners.
data.description: Arkham stated on the X platform that approximately 69.5% of EdgeX's supply is currently stored in addresses directly transferred from the initial developer wallets, some of which may belong to market makers and could be transferred to exchanges in the future. Another 7% of the supply remains unallocated in the airdrop wallets, suggesting a current actual circulating supply of only about 9.5%. While EdgeX nominally airdropped approximately $195 million to users, after on-chain analysts questioned this, the project team admitted that 14% of the total supply was actually allocated to partners and liquidity providers, valued at approximately $94.6 million at the current valuation, almost half of the total airdrop.

data.title: Iranian media: The scale of the explosion in Tehran is unprecedented.
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, Iranian media and eyewitnesses reported that the scale of the explosion in Tehran was unprecedented. (Jinshi)

data.title: Unprecedented Explosion Reported in Tehran
data.description: An explosion of unprecedented scale has been reported in Tehran on April 1, according to BlockBeats. Iranian media and eyewitnesses have confirmed the incident, highlighting the significant impact of the explosion in the area.

data.title: Laplace Experiences Significant Surge with Over 16% Increase
data.description: Laplace has seen a significant increase, with its value rising by more than 16%. According to ChainCatcher, the trading volume has surpassed 600 million yuan.

data.title: Trump will deliver a prime-time address and announce a "major update" on the Iran war.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reports that US President Trump stated he expects US troops to withdraw from Iran within "two to three weeks." Speaking to reporters at the White House, Trump said, "We're leaving because we have no reason to do so." "We'll be leaving very soon." Hours later, the White House announced, "At 9 p.m. ET tomorrow night (9 a.m. Thursday Beijing time), President Trump will deliver a national address providing an important update on the situation in Iran." (Jin Shi)

data.title: Silver Falls Below $74 per Ounce Amid Daily Decline
data.description: Silver prices have dropped below $74 per ounce, experiencing a 1.58% decline within the day. According to Jin10, this decrease reflects ongoing market volatility affecting precious metals. Investors are closely monitoring these fluctuations as they assess potential impacts on their portfolios.

data.title: 中本聪曾回应量子破解比特币风险
data.description: 据 BlockBeats 4 月 1 日报道，中本聪曾于 2010 年在 Bitcointalk 论坛回应量子破解比特币风险，他提出可以通过渐进升级签名算法实现平稳过渡。

data.title: U.S. Military Increases Troop Deployment to Middle East
data.description: The United States is deploying thousands of additional troops to the Middle East, according to reports from the U.S. According to BlockBeats, two American officials have confirmed that the aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush was deployed on April 1, accompanied by three destroyers, to the region. The carrier strike group comprises over 6,000 sailors. Additionally, two anonymous U.S. officials stated that thousands of soldiers from the 82nd Airborne Division have also arrived in the Middle East.

data.title: Justin Sun deposited approximately $16.2 million worth of five different tokens into HTX last night.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Justin Sun deposited five tokens worth approximately $16.2 million into HTX last night, including $2.53 million in TRX, $13.45 million in stablecoins (USDT/USDC/USDD), $12,700 in FF, $75,000 in KERNEL, and $132,000 in LIT. Among these, FF, KERNEL, and LIT are all re-staking project airdrop tokens, suggesting a possible sale.

data.title: Polymarket currently reports a 90% probability that Anthropic will achieve a public valuation exceeding $500 billion by 2026.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, possibly influenced by the news that "OpenAI has completed a $122 billion committed capital round, bringing its post-money valuation to $852 billion," the probability of Anthropic's publicly disclosed valuation exceeding $500 billion in 2026 dropped from 93% to 90% within the day, but rose 4% this week. The criteria for this event are: if, by 11:59 PM Eastern Time on December 31, 2026, a publicly disclosed valuation of $500 billion or higher is achieved, or a company valuation of $500 billion or higher is achieved in private financing, the event will be judged as "yes." Otherwise, it will be judged as "no." This valuation must be explicitly confirmed by Anthropic or have an overwhelming consensus in credible reporting. The primary source will be Anthropic's official communications, but credible consensus reports may also be used. Previously, it was reported that Anthropic completed a $30 billion Series G funding round in February of this year, reaching a post-money valuation of $380 billion. The round was led by GIC and Coatue, with co-lead investors including D.E. Shaw Ventures, Dragoneer, Founders Fund, ICONIQ, and MGX, and participation from Accel, Addition, JPMorgan Chase, Sequoia Capital, and Temasek. Odaily Seer continues to focus on the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Indonesia Explores Measures to Mitigate Fiscal Pressure from Rising Oil Prices
data.description: Barclays economist Brian Tan reports that Indonesian policymakers are considering alternative measures to alleviate fiscal pressure from rising global oil prices before temporarily relaxing the fiscal deficit cap. According to Jin10, recent measures to restrict fuel usage aim to curb subsidy pressure and maintain the deficit below the statutory limit of 3% of GDP. Tan's baseline forecast anticipates a 30% increase in subsidized fuel prices in April to limit the fiscal deficit, although the timing of the price adjustment may be delayed. He adds that Indonesia's central bank may support economic stability in the short term, with expectations of two rate cuts by March 2027, each by 25 basis points, bringing the rate down to 4.25%.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Bar Prices Rise Across Major Brands
data.description: As of April 1, 2026, at 10:30 AM (UTC+8), gold bar prices have shown a mixed trend across major banks and brands, according to Jin10. Notably, brands such as Ya Yi Gold Store, Laopu Gold, and Luk Fook Jewellery have experienced price increases. Ya Yi Gold Store recorded the largest increase, with prices rising by 65 yuan per gram compared to the previous day.
